name: GitLab Inc.
description: GitLab Inc. provides a comprehensive DevSecOps platform that enables organizations to plan, build, secure, and deploy software rapidly and efficiently. Operating as a single application, GitLab's platform integrates development, security, and operations workflows into a unified user interface, fostering collaboration and accelerating software delivery cycles. The company serves a diverse global customer base across various industries, offering both self-managed and cloud-based software-as-a-service (SaaS) solutions.
